title: Palamod Program ART
description: Play with the original Palamod textures! Only works on SILWOX Palamod !
body:
[![Join Discord](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/221890224/524452032-f43fc965-2229-4fd6-a2a2-c8bb51d3c441.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NjUzMDQ0MDEsIm5iZiI6MTc2NTMwNDEwMSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjE4OTAyMjQvNTI0NDUyMDMyLWY0M2ZjOTY1LTIyMjktNGZkNi1hMmEyLWM4YmI1MWQzYzQ0MS5wbmc_.ja3eeF1AK0_r80cSEFILZYIzY8hOpEnm7af-Z6WRCwg)](https://discord.gg/jVGq5aZ6Wc)
## !! 🔴WARNING🔴 !!
**This resource pack is used with the Palamod mod, it is not designed to change minecraft vanilla**
- [Download Palamod ...](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladium)

# Welcome to the Original Paladium 💯
This resource pack restores the old texture to the well-known Palamod of the Paladium server for fans of the old style, this is where you have to go
- Here's a look at what it looks like
### BEFORE
![WITHOUT Texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a33df3a869cc56260974753de6d07c6dd985f721.png)
### AFTER
![WITH TEXTURE PACK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86c9db88eae74bf8332ac95726c6fab5eecc9ba4.png)

- Here are others for the items this time if

### BEFORE
![WITHOUT Texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d77146e13266593fd5f4ea5a90d62176dbfb0ab.png)
### AFTER
![WITH TEXTURE PACK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48b0c5bad8f0a1bc0439498d7b73b582245ee3cb.png)
# CONCLUSION
It should be noted that this resource pack does not modify vanilla Minecraft, it only modifies Palamod to restore the original textures and are aspects of the past
